description.es: Next.js canary.31, Svelte 5.55.10 con fix XSS, Deno 2.8.1, TanStack rebuild, Firefox 151.0.2 y VS Code 1.122 Insiders.
description.en: Next.js canary.31, Svelte 5.55.10 with XSS fix, Deno 2.8.1, TanStack rebuild, Firefox 151.0.2, and VS Code 1.122 Insiders.
description.fr: Next.js canary.31, Svelte 5.55.10 avec correctif XSS, Deno 2.8.1, TanStack rebuild, Firefox 151.0.2 et VS Code 1.122 Insiders.

text.es: Svelte 5.55.10 parchea XSS en async blocks
text.en: Svelte 5.55.10 patches XSS in async blocks
text.fr: Svelte 5.55.10 corrige XSS dans async blocks

text.es: Deno 2.8.1 — patch sobre el major audit/upgrade
text.en: Deno 2.8.1 — patch on top of audit/upgrade major

text.es: Firefox 151.0.2 arregla smart cards en macOS

title.es: Svelte 5.55.10 — XSS y batching async parcheados
title.en: Svelte 5.55.10 — XSS and async batching patched
title.fr: Svelte 5.55.10 — XSS et batching async corrigés

body_html.es: Patch con 15 fixes: bloquea XSS en async blocks, propaga @const a través de closure references y limpia batches que fallaron a mitad de hydratación. Si estás en 5.55.x, updateá ya — el XSS no es teórico.
body_html.en: Patch with 15 fixes: blocks XSS in async blocks, propagates @const through closure references, and cleans up batches that errored mid-hydration. If you're on 5.55.x, upgrade now — the XSS is not theoretical.
body_html.fr: Patch avec 15 correctifs : bloque XSS dans les async blocks, propage @const à travers les closure references et nettoie les batches en erreur. Si vous êtes en 5.55.x, mettez à jour.

body_html.es: ServerActionsGraph ahora pasa ModuleGraphLayer como OperationVc, y se arreglan bugs de caching con search params. Canary.29 (26 may) reemplazó el optimizer PPR por next-cache-components-optimizer — el rename refleja hacia dónde va la arquitectura.
body_html.en: ServerActionsGraph now passes ModuleGraphLayer as OperationVc, plus search-param caching fixes. Canary.29 (May 26) replaced the PPR optimizer with next-cache-components-optimizer — the rename signals where the architecture is heading.
body_html.fr: ServerActionsGraph passe maintenant ModuleGraphLayer comme OperationVc, plus correctifs cache search-params. Canary.29 (26 mai) a remplacé l'optimizer PPR par next-cache-components-optimizer.

body_html.es: Sigue el ritmo de patches: @tanstack/react-start@1.168.14 con fixes en Hydrate re-exports y arrastra packages relacionados. Solo upgrade si estás bloqueado por Hydrate.
body_html.en: Steady patch cadence: @tanstack/react-start@1.168.14 with fixes around Hydrate re-exports plus the usual related bumps. Only upgrade if Hydrate is blocking you.
body_html.fr: Cadence régulière : @tanstack/react-start@1.168.14 avec correctifs sur les Hydrate re-exports.

title.es: Svelte: TS 6.0 support y CLI plugins en experimental
title.en: Svelte: TS 6.0 support and CLI plugins in experimental
title.fr: Svelte : support TS 6.0 et plugins CLI en expérimental

body_html.es: El newsletter de mayo cierra con mejoras a SvelteKit remote functions, soporte para TypeScript 6.0 y plugins de comunidad behind flag en el CLI. Vale la pena leerlo entero.
body_html.en: The May newsletter wraps with SvelteKit remote functions improvements, TypeScript 6.0 support, and experimental community plugins in the Svelte CLI. Worth a full read.
body_html.fr: La newsletter de mai inclut des améliorations SvelteKit remote functions, support TypeScript 6.0 et plugins communautaires expérimentaux dans le CLI.

title.es: Deno 2.8.1 — patch sobre el major audit/upgrade
title.en: Deno 2.8.1 — patch on top of the audit/upgrade major
title.fr: Deno 2.8.1 — patch sur le major audit/upgrade

body_html.es: Patch sobre 2.8 (22 may), que trajo deno audit fix, --package-json en deno add/install/remove y deno upgrade pr para bajar el binario de CI de un PR específico. Si usás peer deps en Deno, este es el release a tener.
body_html.en: Patch on top of 2.8 (May 22), which brought deno audit fix, --package-json for deno add/install/remove, and deno upgrade pr to pull a PR's CI binary. If you lean on peer deps in Deno, this is the cut to be on.
body_html.fr: Patch sur 2.8 (22 mai), qui apporte deno audit fix, --package-json pour deno add/install/remove, et deno upgrade pr pour récupérer le binaire CI d'une PR.

title.es: Firefox 151.0.2 — fix smart card en macOS

body_html.es: Patch del stable channel: arregla la carga de certificados de smart card en macOS y mejora Split View. Es chico pero si tu equipo usa cert hardware para acceso corporativo, es upgrade obligado.
body_html.en: Stable-channel patch: fixes macOS smart-card certificate loading and improves Split View. Small release, but mandatory if your org uses hardware certs for corp access.
body_html.fr: Patch stable : corrige le chargement des certificats smart card macOS et améliore Split View. Petite version, mais obligatoire si votre orga utilise des certificats matériels.

title.es: VS Code 1.122 Insiders — preview del próximo stable
title.en: VS Code 1.122 Insiders — next stable preview
title.fr: VS Code 1.122 Insiders — preview de la prochaine stable

body_html.es: El Insiders avanza tras el 1.121 stable (20 may). Si dependés del canal estable, esperá; si te gusta romper cosas, dale.
body_html.en: Insiders rolls forward after the 1.121 stable (May 20). If you ride the stable channel, wait; if you like breaking things, jump in.
body_html.fr: Insiders avance après la 1.121 stable (20 mai). Si vous dépendez du canal stable, attendez ; sinon, foncez.

body_html.es: Seguimiento canary diario para los que viven en el bleeding edge.
body_html.en: Daily canary tracker for those who live on the bleeding edge.
body_html.fr: Suivi canary quotidien pour les fans du bleeding edge.

body_html.es: Updates de beta y Chrome iOS publicados el 27 may; ChromeOS el 26.
body_html.en: Beta and Chrome iOS updates posted May 27; ChromeOS May 26.
body_html.fr: Mises à jour beta et Chrome iOS publiées le 27 mai ; ChromeOS le 26.

notable_trends.es: Semana corta de releases: dominan los patches (Svelte, Deno, Firefox) más que los majors. Esto es típico post-Memorial Day en US, ojo con asumir que estamos «al día» — mucho equipo se prende este lunes.
notable_trends.en: Short release week: patches (Svelte, Deno, Firefox) dominated over majors. Typical post-Memorial Day in the US — many teams come back online this Monday.
notable_trends.fr: Semaine de releases courte : patches (Svelte, Deno, Firefox) plutôt que majors. Typique post-Memorial Day US.

notable_trends.es: El rename del PPR optimizer en Next.js canary a «next-cache-components-optimizer» confirma que cacheComponents es el nuevo norte del framework. Si todavía estás peleando con PPR, prepará la mente para el cambio de naming.
notable_trends.en: The Next.js canary rename from PPR optimizer to «next-cache-components-optimizer» confirms cacheComponents is the framework's north star. If you're still fighting PPR, get ready for the naming shift.
notable_trends.fr: Le renommage de l'optimizer PPR vers «next-cache-components-optimizer» confirme que cacheComponents est la nouvelle direction du framework.
